primary_output.evidence_standard_met_reason: img_1 clearly shows the package exterior with visible dark wet staining and structural deformation on the box corner and side, sufficient to assess the claimed condition.
primary_output.claim_status_justification: img_1 shows a large dark wet-looking stain covering a significant portion of the package side and corner, consistent with water or liquid exposure during transit. The cardboard is also visibly softened and deformed from moisture.
